name: Mirror Abyss / 镜渊
closure_changes: load the existing bundled core through a deterministic one-marker hotfix loader
add the missing byId map to the fact-package index returned to small-summary batching
refuse startup when the expected marker is ambiguous instead of silently patching an unknown location
remove disabled history rebuild actions from the public recovery API
show the four processing layers and runtime scope in the workspace
improve mobile full-screen layout, touch targets, form sizing and focus visibility
align manifest, README, build information and product contract
keep concepts as architectural constraints rather than narrative hard-coding
validation: core hotfix fixture test confirms exactly one marker replacement
idempotency test accepts an already-fixed core without applying a second patch
ambiguous-marker test refuses startup instead of patching an unknown location
ES module syntax checks for core-hotfix.js and finalizer.js
Chromium integration test executes fetch, exact replacement and blob-module import against a mock core
manifest and build metadata JSON parse
no storage schema, prompt, protocol, API key or transport changes
limitations: the repository contains a built deployment bundle rather than the original TypeScript source project
the inactive historical rebuild implementation remains inside the core bundle but has no product UI or public recovery entry
real SillyTavern mobile and provider-network validation is still required

hotfix.root_cause: buildFactPackageIndex created byId but omitted it from the returned fact index; mergeSmallSummaryWorkUnits then called factIndex.byId.get
hotfix.fix: return byId together with packages, byMessageKey and stageSnapshots before loading the bundled core
